x.summary:
One of the smartest people i know, ex-One Medical, ex-Bridgewater founder backed by a16z is building a stealth NYC health-tech company.

He's doing AI-first medicine with physical clinics

Hiring staff+ engineers, physicians who ship product, and a Codex-native Chief of Staff/BizOps lead

You should email him if you want to work on something like this: every@rungravity.com
x.author: danshipper

x.title: Agentic coding forces you to design clean interfaces and document them well. An agent cannot read the implicit mental mo
x.summary: Agentic coding forces you to design clean interfaces and document them well. An agent cannot read the implicit mental model shared by your engineering team, it can only read your API contracts and docstrings.
x.author: fchollet
